name: Reservation Submit for Approval
subject: New Reservation Request - {{ reservation.meeting_room }}
response_html:
A new reservation request requires your approval. Reservation Details:
  • Room: {{ reservation.meeting_room }}
  • Start Time: {{ reservation.start_time }}
  • End Time: {{ reservation.end_time }}
  • Person in Charge: {{ reservation.person_in_charge }}
  • Department: {{ reservation.department }}
  • Attendees: {{ reservation.number_of_attendees }}
  • Reason: {{ reservation.meeting_reason }}

Please review and approve/reject this request.
